_meta.name: English
_meta.author: MrTea07 (Ai-translated)
_meta.guide.1: === HOW TO CREATE YOUR OWN TRANSLATION ===
_meta.guide.2: 1. Copy this file to the languages folder next to the program
_meta.guide.3: 2. Rename the copy - call it anything, for example: my_language.json
_meta.guide.4: 3. Change _meta.language to a unique code, for example: my_language
_meta.guide.5: 4. Change _meta.name to a display name - it will appear in the language selection menu
_meta.guide.6: 5. Replace the values to the right of ':' with your translation (do not touch the keys on the left)
_meta.guide.7: 6. Launch the editor - your language will appear in the Language menu
_meta.guide.8: The list of editor languages (ru, en, etc.) is updated from the server.
_meta.guide.9: Your translation may be overwritten if _meta.language matches a language from that list.
_meta.guide.10: Want to share your translation? Send the file via the feedback form in the editor - it may be added to the public list.

instructions.title: Instructions
instructions.editor_header: Space Haven Save Editor - User Guide
instructions.start_2: 2. Navigate to the game save folder:
instructions.edit_1: 1. After loading the save, select the desired ship from the dropdown
instructions.edit_2: 2. Edit the required parameters on the corresponding tabs
instructions.edit_3: 3. Double-click a character or storage to open the editing window
instructions.edit_4: 4. When done, save the file (File -> Save File or Ctrl+S)
instructions.edit_5: 5. Launch Space Haven and load the save to see your changes
instructions.restore_1: If the save is corrupted, find the backup file 'game.backup' in the save folder,
instructions.restore_2: delete the corrupted 'game' file and rename the backup to 'game'.
instructions.feat_sandbox: - Sandbox mode activation - unlocks items and research
instructions.feat_research: - Edit research parameters, including instant unlock of all technologies
instructions.feat_chars_stats: - Stats (food, rest, comfort, mood, body temperature, spacesuit,
instructions.feat_chars_stats2: oxygen tank, oxygen deprivation, gases (CO2, smoke, hazardous gas))
instructions.feat_chars_food: - Character nutrition (body reserves and stomach food)
instructions.feat_chars_faction: - Change character faction to player faction (prisoner is freed)
instructions.feat_currency: - Change player currency and Exodus Fleet prestige points
instructions.feat_storage_quick: - Quick buttons for different storage types: add food, parts, bodies, contraband
instructions.feat_storage_set: - Add item set - select multiple items by category at once
instructions.feat_storage_edit: - Direct amount editing in the table - click the amount field
instructions.feat_storage_hold: - '+' button with hold - hold for continuous +10 increment
instructions.feat_storage_apply: - 'Apply to Selected' - sets the entered amount for all selected items [Extended Mode]
instructions.feat_storage_sort: - Sort by columns: Category, Name, Amount - click the column header
instructions.feat_storage_del: - Delete removes selected items (multiple selection supported)
instructions.feat_factions: - Edit faction relations and access settings
instructions.feat_exodus: - Exodus Fleet Resources - create Exodus Fleet resources at player location
instructions.feat_max_all: - Max All for All Characters - applies Max All to all characters on the selected ship
instructions.feat_constructor: - Sector Constructor - create ship templates and transfer between saves
instructions.feat_tpl_create_1: 1. Open the save with the desired ship
instructions.feat_tpl_create_3: 3. Select the ship in the left panel
instructions.feat_tpl_create_4: 4. Enter a template name and click 'Create Template'
instructions.feat_tpl_edit_1: 1. Select the template in the center panel
instructions.feat_tpl_edit_2: 2. Edit: name, X/Y coordinates (0-9), owner, crew
instructions.feat_tpl_edit_3: 3. Clear crew or storage if needed
instructions.feat_tpl_add: - Adding a ship to the game
instructions.feat_map_move: - Move objects - hold LMB on an object and drag to the desired cell
instructions.feat_map_del: - Delete objects - select an object and press Delete
instructions.feat_map_save: - After changes click 'Save Map' and save the file (Ctrl+S)
instructions.hotkey_save: - Ctrl+S - save file (works in any window)
instructions.hotkey_undo: - Ctrl+Z - undo last 5 actions (in storage and character editor for the active tab)
instructions.hotkey_search: - Ctrl+F - focus search field (in storage editor)
instructions.hotkey_delete: - Delete - remove selected items (in storage and character editor)
instructions.maxall_desc: - 'Max All' (for individual character) - sets maximum values:
instructions.maxall_suit: - If character is in a spacesuit - tank filled to 1000
instructions.maxall_stats_only: - 'Max Stats' - stats only (no skills or attributes)
instructions.tools_ids: - Help -> IDs (items, etc.) - view game object identifiers
instructions.tools_ids_search: - search IDs by item name and export the ID list
instructions.tools_lang: - Help -> Language - change interface language (Russian / English)
instructions.tools_extended: - Help -> Extended Mode - additional features for supporters
instructions.bug_1: Include the game version (bottom left of main menu, e.g. 'Beta 0 0.00.0 gog/steam build 00'),
instructions.bug_2: the save editor version, the log (editor.log in the program folder),
instructions.bug_3: the error message (crash.txt in the game folder) and a detailed description of what happened.
instructions.mod_backup: Create a backup of spacehaven.jar before modifying.
instructions.mod_no_run: Do not modify the file while the game is running.
instructions.mod_1: 1. Open the modifier via the menu
instructions.mod_3: 3. Find spacehaven.jar in the game folder
instructions.mod_auto_backup: The modifier automatically creates a backup named:
instructions.mod_backup_name: spacehaven.jar.backup yyyy MM dd_HH mm ss
instructions.mod_backup_desc: Where yyyy MM dd_HH mm ss is Year Month Day_Hour Minute Second of backup creation
instructions.mod_warning: All modifications apply to ALL objects in the game, including objects of other factions
instructions.mod_item_1: 1. System Points = 0 (Removes system point cost from all structures)
instructions.mod_item_5: 5. Shields (Increases shield power for better protection)
instructions.mod_restore_desc: If the game does not start after modification:

main.title: Space Haven Save Editor
validation.select_item: Select an item from the list
validation.amount_positive: Amount must be greater than zero
validation.select_patch: Select at least one patch to apply
feedback.watermark_bug:
When reporting a bug, please include:
- A detailed description of what happened
- Game version (bottom left of main menu, e.g. 'Beta 0 0.00.0 gog/steam build 00')
- Save editor version
- Log (editor.log in the program folder if Attach doesn't work)
- Error message (crash.txt in the game folder)
feedback.watermark_question:
Before asking a question, try to find the answer in the instructions:
Menu -> Help -> Instructions
feedback.watermark_share:
Describe in detail...
Feel free to attach a template and a screenshot from the game
You can leave any message
diff.desc_moodDifficulty: Sets a mood penalty to the crew's base mood per level of 10. Low=70, Medium=60, High=50
diff.desc_npcTargeting: Set difficulty by defining the AI strategy in ship battles. Low - weaker, High - smarter
diff.desc_questDifficulty: Adjust difficulty of main missions and events. Low - easier quests
diff.desc_enemiesEnabled: On: crew members can become enemies with each other
diff.desc_friendsEnabled: On: crew members can become friends
diff.desc_loversEnabled: On: crew members can fall in love with each other
diff.desc_fullDismantle: On: dismantling returns all resources used to build it. Off: scrap instead of blocks
diff.desc_rebuildingCosts: On: rebuilding broken installations requires all resources.
diff.desc_wearAndTear: Off: no wear. Tools: repair with tools only. Full: repair requires tools and resources
diff.desc_itemWearBrake: On: items can break during use or repair
diff.desc_randomness: Balanced randomness provides balance in resources and other game elements. Pure Randomness gives a completely unpredictable galaxy (resource amounts, derelicts and more will be entirely random).
diff.desc_robots: How often stray bots will appear in the galaxy
diff.desc_solarFlares: How often solar flares will occur
diff.desc_microMeteoroids: How often micro meteoroids will appear
diff.desc_sirenWorlds: How often siren worlds will appear
diff.desc_solarHeat: How strongly the sun heats the ship hull in a sector
diff.desc_interTravelThreat: This parameter affects the severity of negative effects on crew members traveling between stars without a hypersleep chamber.
diff.desc_asteroids: This parameter affects the danger level of asteroids in sectors with asteroid fields
diff.desc_derelicts: How often derelict ships will appear
diff.desc_derelictLoot: How many resources will be found on derelict ships
lang.reload_hint: For a full language refresh - reopen the save file
